If enabled, note blocks blocked by a block above will still emit the note block game event for Allays.
carpet.rule.allayAiFreezeEnabled.name: Allay AI Freeze
carpet.rule.allayAiFreezeEnabled.desc: Freezes idle Allay AI when no visible player or liked note block is nearby.
carpet.rule.allayThrowCooldownTicks.name: Allay Throw Cooldown Ticks
carpet.rule.allayThrowCooldownTicks.desc: Overrides the allay item pickup cooldown after throwing. Use -1 for vanilla (60 ticks).
carpet.rule.allayMaxHearingDistance.name: Allay Max Hearing Distance
carpet.rule.allayMaxHearingDistance.desc: Overrides the maximum distance at which Allays can hear note blocks. Use -1 for vanilla (16 blocks).
carpet.rule.renewableDragonBreath.name: Renewable Dragon Breath
carpet.rule.renewableDragonBreath.desc: Allows dragon breath clouds to be renewed through SRU dragon egg interactions.
carpet.rule.mcdrCommandAutoCompletion.de: Adds client-side tab completion for common !!MCDR command prefixes.
carpet.rule.limitTntRandomMomentum.name: Limit TNT Random Momentum
carpet.rule.limitTntRandomMomentum.desc: Limits TNT random momentum using the SRU configured angle list.
carpet.rule.visibleSpectators.name: Visible Spectators
carpet.rule.visibleSpectators.desc: Makes spectators visible for SRU server gameplay compatibility.
